pageContext.name: Plush Body Good Guy
pageContext.description: The Officially Licensed Plush Body Good Guy Doll is the perfect Friend 'Till The End!  A great new option for the Horror super-fan who loves to take their Friend on the go or just as an incredible addition to your collection. The Plush Body Good Guy Doll captures that perfect body flop you see in the films when Chucky is pretending to not be alive or being dragged around by Andy. This version features a combination of a soft stuffed plush torso and limbs, a new durable fabric outfit, combined with high-quality vinyl head, hands, and shoes! The Plush Body Good Guy Doll is approximately 30 long.   Get yourself a Plush Body Good Guy today!
